highlights.description: Auto-approve tool requests for AI coding CLIs (Kiro, Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) running in tmux

added.description: `watch` command to monitor tmux panes for tool approval prompts and auto-approve them
`status` command to display tmux environment and available panes
`test` command to verify prompt detection patterns are working
`config` command group for configuration management (path, show, init, example)
`stats` command to track approval statistics during watch sessions
`version` command to display build information
Support for AWS Kiro CLI approval prompts (`tool use ... requires approval, press 'y' to approve`)
Support for Claude Code approval prompts (`Allow? (Y/n)`, `Allow once`)
Support for Codex CLI approval prompts (`Proceed? (Y/n)`)
Support for Gemini CLI approval prompts (`(Y/n)` prompts)
Dangerous command blocking for `rm -rf`, `sudo rm`, `mkfs`, `dd if=`, `curl|bash`, `wget|sh`, `chmod -R 777 /`
Dry-run mode (`--dry-run`) to test detection without sending approvals
Configurable scan interval (`--interval`) for responsive approval
Session filtering (`--session`) to watch specific tmux sessions
Verbose logging (`-v/--verbose`) for debugging
macOS notifications support (`--notify`) for approval events
Statistics tracking (`--stats`) with session summaries
Duplicate approval prevention to avoid multiple keystrokes
YAML configuration file support (`~/.agentsentinel.yaml`)
Custom pattern configuration for additional prompt formats
Shell completion scripts for bash, zsh, and fish

documentation.description: Comprehensive README with quick start guide and multi-agent workflow examples
Configuration file documentation with full example

build.description: GoReleaser configuration for multi-platform binary releases
GitHub Actions CI workflow for testing and linting
Makefile with build, test, lint, and install targets
